name: left-to-right-forfeiture
description: Numbers and connection fields share one left-to-right sequence: jumping ahead to a later connection field forfeits every skipped number AND field to its left, forever.

steps.note: current max pos is 2 (number index 1); red field1 sits after column 4 (doubled pos 9) — legal even though field0 (pos 3) and numbers 2/3/4 (pos 4/6/8) are still unmarked
field0 (pos 3) is now to the left of the new max pos (9) — forfeited forever
number index 2 (col 2, pos 4) is left of pos 9 — forfeited
number index 3 (col 3, pos 6) is left of pos 9 — forfeited
number index 4 (col 4, pos 8) is left of pos 9 — forfeited
number index 5 (col 5, pos 10) is right of pos 9 — legal
final marks: numbers {0,1,5} plus connection field {1} = 4 crosses
